description: AccuWeather provides weather data and forecasts, including current conditions, daily and hourly forecasts, alerts, MinuteCast precipitation forecasts, and related meteorological datasets. Its products serve consumer weather experiences and business integrations.
summary: AccuWeather exposes a documented REST weather API on api.accuweather.com/apidev.accuweather.com authenticated with an API key passed as the `apikey` query parameter; no public GraphQL, MCP server, CLI, or machine-readable OpenAPI spec was found.
